title: ASR Outdoor Pop Top Sports Water Bottle 33oz Fitness Daily Hydration
description:
The ASR Outdoor pop-top sports water bottle is constructed of durable BPA-free plastic so you don’t need to worry about harmful chemicals getting into your water or hydration drink of choice. This bottle holds up to 33.8 fluid ounces (just over 4 cups), making it a great size for travel. It will easily fit in most car cup holders, purses, backpacks, or gym bags so you can make sure you’re getting your daily water intake. The ASR Outdoor fitness water bottle features a pop-top lid that you can easily open with your teeth so you don’t have to rely on your hands to manually open it during your workout, whether you’re at the gym, or on your bike or hiking. The lid also comes with a handy hang loop so you can hang it from your backpack or gym bag

ASR Outdoor Pop Top Sports Water Bottle 33oz Fitness Daily Hydration

The ASR Outdoor pop-top sports water bottle is constructed of durable BPA-free plastic so you don’t need to worry about harmful chemicals getting into your water or hydration drink of choice.

Key Features

  • BPA FREE WATER BOTTLE - The ASR Outdoor pop-top sports water bottle is constructed of durable BPA-free plastic so you don’t need to worry about harmful chemicals getting into your water or hydration drink of choice.
  • LARGE CAPACITY - This bottle holds up to 33.8 fluid ounces (just over 4 cups), making it a great size for travel. It will easily fit in most car cup holders, purses, backpacks or gym bags so you can make sure you’re getting your daily water intake.
  • POP TOP LID - The ASR Outdoor fitness water bottle features a pop-top lid that you can easily open with your teeth so you don’t have to rely on your hands to manually open it during your workout, whether you’re at the gym, on your bike or hiking. The lid also comes with a handy hang loop so you can hang it from your backpack or gym bag.
  • MEASUREMENTS ON BOTTLE - The bottle comes with printed measurements (in ounces) so you can keep track of how much water you’ve consumed throughout the day. Drinking plenty of water each day will help you stay hydrated and can assist with weight loss efforts.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: BPA free plastic; Measurements: fluid ounces: Capacity: 33.8oz/4.225 cups; Lid color: purple; Weight: .3lbs/4.8oz

  • Size: 33 oz
